Interface IRESTOperation

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

REST operation metadata object.

[Guid("2853CA57-AE88-4B5D-ADA3-4CF6F938A0E0")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRESTOperation

Properties

Name

Operation name. Used in IRESTRequestHandler's schema generation and url parsing.

string Name { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

OutputFormats

Supported output formats, separated by comma.

string OutputFormats { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Parameters

Operation parameters, separated by comma.

string Parameters { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

PostOnly

Denotes POST-only operations.

bool PostOnly { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

RequiredCapability

Required capability for the operation.

string RequiredCapability { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Sample Snippet

Converts operation object to JSON representation.
